sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25739" key="diarrikno/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαρρικνόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n25739.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw up and twist the body,</tr_> of an unseemly kind of dance, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:219" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">219</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
